 *   El indicador usa font-size grande (.50rem) para visibilidad en móvil.
 *
 * ── SUPERUSUARIO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
 *   Los superusuarios (isSuperUser = true) no tienen límite de partidas.
 *   Se activa desde Perfil → toggle "MODO SUPERUSUARIO".
 *   Badge "⭐ SUPERUSUARIO — sin límite" visible en el lobby.
 *
 * ── XP NERFADA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 *   Los juegos dan menos XP que las misiones para mantener el balance.
 *   Fórmula: xpFinal = min(xpBase × (1 + score/800), xpBase × 2)
 *   Monedas:  coinsFinal = min(coinsBase × (1 + score/1000), coinsBase × 1.5)
 *
 * Props:
 *   onGameDone(xp, coins, stat, gameId, score) — propagado a HomeScreen

Cada juego entrena un atributo distinto.",!isSuperUser&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"mg-limit-note",children:[" \xB7 M\xE1ximo ",MAX_PLAYS," partidas por juego cada 24h."]}),isSuperUser&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"mg-super-note",children:" \xB7 \u2B50 SUPERUSUARIO \u2014 sin l\xEDmite de partidas."})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"games-grid",children:GAMES.map(g=>{const{count,timeLeft}=getPlayInfo(gamePlays,g.id);const playsLeft=isSuperUser?Infinity:Math.max(0,MAX_PLAYS-count);const isLocked=!isSuperUser&&playsLeft===0;const hasGrad=!!g.color2;const cardStyle=hasGrad?{"--gc":g.color,"--gc2":g.color2,background:`linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, ${g.color} 10%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, ${g.color2} 10%, transparent))`}:{"--gc":g.color};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`game-card${hasGrad?" game-card-multi":""}${isLocked?" game-card-locked":""}`,style:cardStyle,onClick:()=>!isLocked&&onSelect(g),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"game-card-top",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"game-icon",children:g.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"game-diff",children:g.diff})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"game-name",children:g.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"game-desc",children:g.desc}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"game-footer",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"game-stat-tags",children:(g.stats||[g.stat]).map((s,i)=>{const c=i===0?g.color:g.color2||g.color;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"game-stat-tag",style:{"--gc":c},children:s},s);})}),!isSuperUser&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`game-plays-left${isLocked?" locked":playsLeft===1?" warn":""}`,children:isLocked?`🔒 ${fmtTimeLeft(timeLeft)}`:`▶ ${playsLeft}/${MAX_PLAYS}`}),isSuperUser&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"game-rewards",children:["+",g.xp," XP \uD83E\uDE99 ",g.coins]})]})]},g.id);})})]})});}// ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
